title: Shake It Off
why_this_song: High-frequency phrasal verb 'shake off' + present continuous narration. The catchy repetition makes it stick fast.

vocab_hooks.note: phrasal verb — central to the song
informal noun, common in social media
ambiguous — players of games or players of hearts
reduction of 'going to' — very common in pop

grammar_callouts: present continuous as habit: players gonna play

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "players" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "players" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gonna" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: It's like I got this music

exercises.prompt_en: "Shake It Off" was released in 2014. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Shake It Off" foi lançada em 2014. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Shake It Off" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Shake It Off" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Reductions (gonna, haters) are key listening challenges. Discuss register — when to use these informal forms.

lines: I go on too many dates
Shake it off, I shake it off
I, I, I shake it off, I shake it off
I, I, I shake it off, I shake it off
I, I, I shake it off, I shake it off (ooh-ooh-ooh)
